Bait-and-Switch

google_review_snippets.text: Like I see from several others, I never applied for a loan, nor did I reach out, but I keep getting robo calls and texts. There doesn't seem to be a way to stop it since I'm not even talking to a person. I use my phone for work, which makes this even more annoying.
google_review_snippets.author: Joshua Schuettenhelm

google_review_snippets.text: Multiple phone calls a day for a “loan” I never requested. Blocking their numbers never seems to work because they seem to have yet another number to attempt to allegedly scam people with.
